summary: Tested new GET /api/admin/user-stats endpoint and User Stats card in admin dashboard. Backend returns correct JSON structure with 30-sec cache. Frontend displays 3 metrics with correct colors (purple/blue/green). All existing admin tabs still work.
passed_tests: Cache working - sequential calls return same data within 30s
Admin overview tab shows User Stats card (data-testid='user-stats-card')
Total Users has purple color (#7B61FF / rgb(123, 97, 255))
Existing stats grid still renders (stat-total-users, stat-pro-users)
Overview tab returns correctly after tab navigation
context_for_next_testing_agent: User stats endpoint and card fully working. Backend caches for 30 seconds. Frontend shows 3 metrics: Total Users (purple #7B61FF), New Users 7d (blue), Active 24h (green #00FF94). Card sits between existing stats grid and Recent Activity section. ~79 total users, ~26 new in 7d, 0 active in 24h (no recent logins).
mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs - reads directly from MongoDB users collection
